title: Create Aeronautics: Rubies
description: Some small utilities that I wanted in Create Aeronautics
body:
# Rubies

A collection of utilities that I, Ruby, wanted.

![A collection of blocks arranged as a showcase, see below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c753a06f88f5e37b95ac48ddcf8ab22249b31cf.png)

## Features

- Chunk Loaders with sub-level support.
- Load Detector, emits Redstone when a chunk is loaded.
- Pole, a hollow block fitting a sub-level Shaft.
- Telescopic Actuator, a telescopic piston-like.
- Regex support in Frogports, Postboxes, and Package Filters.
- Inverted Gyroscopic Propeller Bearing, trying to align to +gravity.
- Redstone Propeller Bearing, aligning with Redstone power.
- Gyroscopic Horizon Propeller Bearing, trying to align to the horizon line.
- Networked Redstone Link, paired up just like Stock networks.

While no Ponders exist (yet), all features have descriptions available in-game.
